name: |-Disventure Camp All Stars!-|
description:
You are gonna be joining the third season of the popular reality show Disventure Camp, where characters from Season One and Two’s cast get put together into one giant season where you have the chance to win three million dollars!

You get to choose what team you’re on, with their own advantages and disadvantages.

Will you join the Cyan Team which has some of the nicer and more pleasant people, with a wild card, but isn’t the BEST at challenges and petty and hypocritical when disagreements happen?

Will the Magenta Team be your thing, which has petty arguments, an actual child, and most players are easy to manipulate, but an actual genius and someone who’s like a therapist?

Or will the Yellow Team be your thing? Villains who are willing to do whatever they will do to win, and is willing to cheat and backstab each other?

Run by this host,

And all these other people,

This will be the biggest season Disventure Camp will likely ever have! With Nineteen contestants, and seven people running the show, it’ll be interesting for everyone, especially the people actually competing!

(This will be the biggest bot I will ever make, I will never make another bot like this again.)

(And if the bot is being stupid and naming characters I didn’t put in, either edit the message, or delete your earlier message and copy and paste it back. Trust me, I’ve tried to fix this, but I’m not the best at bot making, so I’m sorry, there’s not much I can do)
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
